tasks.title: Scaffold @repo/ai-core package skeleton
tasks.description: Create packages/ai-core with package.json (name @repo/ai-core, ESM, named exports), tsconfig extending @repo/typescript-config, vitest config, and src/index.ts barrel. Add empty src dirs: providers, engine, capabilities, config, usage, safety, storage, types. Wire into pnpm workspace + turbo. Verify: pnpm typecheck passes on empty package. Tests: trivial src/index.test.ts asserting the barrel imports without error.

subtasks.title: Create empty src module dirs + index.ts barrel

tasks.title: Add Vercel AI SDK dependencies to @repo/ai-core
tasks.description: Add ai, @ai-sdk/openai, @ai-sdk/anthropic as dependencies of packages/ai-core (per §5.2, MIT, runs on VPS, no Vercel account). Pin versions. Do NOT add to apps directly. Verify: pnpm install clean, package builds. No new code logic. Tests: none (dependency-only setup task).

subtasks.title: Pin versions and run pnpm install

tasks.title: Register HOSPEDA_AI_VAULT_MASTER_KEY env var
tasks.description: Register HOSPEDA_AI_VAULT_MASTER_KEY in packages/config/src/env-registry.*.ts (description, type string, required, secret true, apps [api], category). Add Zod validation (min 32 chars) in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts ApiEnvBaseSchema. Add placeholder to apps/api/.env.example. Per §5.5 env workflow. STOP after and flag owner to set it in Coolify for hospeda-api-prod/staging. Tests: pnpm env:check:registry passes; add a unit assertion in env test that the key is required.

subtasks.title: Add Zod min-32 validation in apps/api env.ts

tasks.title: Create ai_settings + ai_prompt_versions DB schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/ai/ai-settings.dbschema.ts (JSONB value blob keyed by key, mirroring platform_settings per Q7) and ai-prompt-versions.dbschema.ts (feature, version, content, is_active, history). Soft-delete + timestamps. Export from ai barrel. Per §5.4. Run pnpm db:generate. Tests: schema unit test asserting columns/defaults; migration file generated.

subtasks.title: Export from ai barrel + generate migration

tasks.title: Create ai_provider_credentials + ai_credential_audit DB schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/ai/ai-provider-credentials.dbschema.ts (encrypted key ciphertext, iv, providerId, metadata) and ai-credential-audit.dbschema.ts (Q1: dedicated table — actor, action created/rotated/deleted, providerId, ip, timestamp; permanent, NOT soft-delete). Per §5.4/§5.5. Export from ai barrel, db:generate. Tests: schema unit tests asserting ciphertext column never stores plaintext shape and audit action enum.

subtasks.title: Export from ai barrel + generate migration

tasks.title: Create ai_usage + ai_request_log DB schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/ai/ai-usage.dbschema.ts (userId, feature, provider, model, tokensIn, tokensOut, costEstimate centavos integer, latencyMs, status, timestamp) and ai-request-log.dbschema.ts (PII-scrubbed request metadata). Soft-delete + timestamps; cost as integer centavos per money convention. Index by userId+feature+createdAt for reporting. Export from ai barrel, db:generate. Tests: schema unit tests asserting cost is integer and reporting index exists.

subtasks.title: Export from ai barrel + generate migration

tasks.title: Create ai_conversations + ai_messages DB schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/ai/ai-conversations.dbschema.ts (generic multi-turn container, userId) and ai-messages.dbschema.ts (conversationId FK, role, content verbatim, tokens, provider). Soft-delete + timestamps. Per §5.4 (used by chat child spec). Export from ai barrel, db:generate. Tests: schema unit tests asserting FK relation and role enum.

subtasks.title: Export from ai barrel + generate migration

tasks.title: Author core AI Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Per Q3 (strict SSoT), author Zod schemas in @repo/schemas/src/entities/ai/: ai-settings.schema.ts (config blob: providers on/off, fallback order, per-feature model+params, feature flags, quotas), ai-provider.schema.ts (provider/model identifiers), ai-prompt.schema.ts (versioned prompt). Export from package barrel. Tests: schema unit tests for valid/invalid config blobs and prompt shapes (AAA).

tasks.title: Author AI capability + intent Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Per Q3, author Zod schemas in @repo/schemas/src/entities/ai/: ai-capability.schema.ts (generateText/streamText/generateObject/moderate request+response shapes, locale es|en|pt param), ai-intent.schema.ts (typed validated intent object for extractIntent, consumed by NL search + chat). Export from barrel. Tests: schema unit tests covering locale enum and intent validation edge cases.

subtasks.title: Export from barrel + write unit tests

tasks.title: Implement @repo/ai-core storage module
tasks.description: Create src/storage/ — the ONLY module touching @repo/db (AC-4 isolation). Implement read/write of ai_settings blob + ai_prompt_versions + ai_usage insert + ai_request_log insert via getDb(). RO-RO, named exports, JSDoc. Validate config reads against the @repo/schemas ai-settings schema. Tests: unit tests with a stubbed db asserting reads parse via schema and writes shape rows correctly.

tasks.title: Implement AI config resolver + cache invalidation
tasks.description: Create src/config/ — resolveConfig() reads the ai_settings blob via storage, resolves per-feature model+params+fallback chain+flags+quotas, with an in-memory cache invalidated on write (mind R-7 / billing 300s gotcha — invalidate explicitly on write, not just TTL). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting resolution of per-feature config and that a write invalidates the cache (no stale read).

tasks.title: Define AiProvider interface + StubProvider
tasks.description: Create src/providers/ai-provider.interface.ts — package-owned interface (generateText, streamText, generateObject, extractIntent, moderate, embed iface) never referencing Vercel SDK types directly (§5.2, R-4). Create stub.provider.ts: deterministic StubProvider for tests (§5.14, R-6). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting StubProvider returns deterministic shapes for each capability.

tasks.title: Implement Vercel OpenAI + Anthropic provider adapters
tasks.description: Create src/providers/vercel-openai.adapter.ts and vercel-anthropic.adapter.ts wrapping ai + @ai-sdk/* behind the AiProvider interface (§5.2). Credentials arrive by parameter (never env — AC-4). Implement generateText/streamText/generateObject/extractIntent. Include moderate() in the OpenAI adapter (Q4 default moderation impl). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests with the SDK mocked asserting each adapter maps to the interface and passes the key param through.

tasks.title: Implement engine routing + fallback + retries
tasks.description: Create src/engine/ — routing layer selecting per-feature primary provider + fallback chain from resolved config (§5.3), with retries and automatic fallback on timeout/5xx/rate-limit, recording the fallback event. Leave a V2 hook for cost-based/ensemble/AB routing without API change. RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests with StubProvider asserting primary success, fallback on simulated 5xx (AC-2), and fallback-event recording.

tasks.title: Implement AiService public capabilities surface
tasks.description: Create the public AiService in src/engine/ + src/capabilities/ exposing generateText, generateObject, extractIntent, moderate, embed-iface (stub) over the routing engine (FR-1). Locale-aware by parameter es|en|pt, default es (§5.12, FR-13). Export from src/index.ts (named only). streamText is wired in T-024. RO-RO, JSDoc on all exports. Tests: unit tests per capability via StubProvider asserting contract shapes + locale propagation.

tasks.title: Implement usage metering recorder + cost calculator
tasks.description: Create src/usage/ — record every call into ai_usage via storage (tokens, feature, provider, model, latency, status) and a cost calculator producing integer centavos from token counts × per-model rates (§5.7/FR-7). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting a recorded row matches AC-7 fields and cost is computed in centavos for sample token counts.

tasks.title: Implement cost ceiling + kill-switch tracking
tasks.description: Create src/usage/ceiling — track accumulated spend (global/per-feature/per-provider) against admin-set ceilings; hard-stop the affected scope on breach (controlled error) until period reset (§5.8/FR-9). Implement manual kill-switch state per feature/provider read from config. RO-RO, JSDoc. Threshold alerts are T-025. Tests: unit tests asserting hard-stop at ceiling (AC-8) and immediate stop when kill-switch off (AC-9).

subtasks.title: Accumulated-spend tracking (global/feature; per-provider deferred per owner 2026-06-04)

tasks.title: Implement usage reporting query helpers
tasks.description: Create src/usage/reporting — query helpers aggregating ai_usage per user / feature / month (counts, tokens, cost centavos) backing the admin reporting endpoints (FR-7). Read-only via storage. RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests with stubbed db asserting aggregation by user/feature/month buckets.

tasks.title: Implement prompt-injection guard + PII scrubber
tasks.description: Create src/safety/ — injection-guard (input sanitization + basic override-attempt detection, §5.10.2) and pii-scrubber (redact emails/phones/cards before any Sentry/PostHog emit; DB keeps verbatim, §5.10.4/AC-11). RO-RO, JSDoc. Moderation hook reuses AiProvider.moderate (T-013). Tests: unit tests asserting injection patterns flagged and PII redacted in telemetry payload while raw text preserved (AC-11).

tasks.title: Wire moderation pass into AiService flow
tasks.description: In src/safety/ + engine, route input/output through a moderation pass (AiProvider.moderate, Q4 OpenAI default) before serving/storing (§5.10.3). Block/flag on moderation failure with a controlled error. RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests with StubProvider moderation asserting flagged content is blocked and clean content passes.

tasks.title: Implement AES-256-GCM vault crypto util in apps/api
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/utils/ai-vault.ts: encrypt/decrypt AES-256-GCM using HOSPEDA_AI_VAULT_MASTER_KEY (read only here, §5.5). Round-trip encrypt → store ciphertext+iv, decrypt → plaintext. Package never touches this (AC-4). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting ciphertext != plaintext, round-trip equality with a throwaway key, and tamper detection (auth tag).

subtasks.title: Write crypto round-trip + tamper unit tests

tasks.title: Implement credential vault service + audit writes
tasks.description: Create the credential service (apps/api or service-core extending BaseService, Result<T>) to create/rotate/delete provider keys: encrypt via T-021, store in ai_provider_credentials, and write an ai_credential_audit row (actor, action, providerId, ip) on every mutation (Q1, §5.5/FR-4). Rotation without redeploy. Tests: unit tests asserting each mutation writes an audit row and stored value is ciphertext (AC-3 store half).

tasks.title: Add AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE permission + seed wiring
tasks.description: Add PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE (SUPER_ADMIN only, following SPEC-164 super-only pattern, §5.6). Wire into role-permission seed for SUPER_ADMIN. Enum is push/seed-managed per repo convention. Tests: unit/seed test asserting SUPER_ADMIN has the permission and lower roles do not.

tasks.title: Implement streamText capability in @repo/ai-core
tasks.description: Add streamText(...) to AiService returning an async iterable of tokens over the routing engine (§5.9/FR-10). Consumed later by SSE route. Locale-aware. RO-RO, JSDoc, named export. Tests: unit tests via StubProvider asserting tokens are yielded incrementally and fallback applies to the stream path too.

tasks.title: Implement cost threshold alerts via @repo/notifications
tasks.description: Wire 50/80/100% ceiling threshold alerts to the SUPER_ADMIN through @repo/notifications (§5.8/FR-9), triggered by the ceiling tracker (T-017). De-dupe so each threshold fires once per period. RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting an alert is sent exactly once per crossed threshold (AC-8 alert half) with @repo/notifications mocked.

tasks.title: Create admin AI credential vault routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api admin routes /api/v1/admin/ai/credentials* (list/create/rotate/delete) via createAdminRoute, guarded by AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, calling the credential service (T-022). Never return plaintext keys. ResponseFactory contract. Tests: route unit tests asserting non-super rejected (403), create returns ciphertext-masked response, and an audit row is written.

tasks.title: Create admin AI settings routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api admin routes /api/v1/admin/ai/settings* (get/update the ai_settings blob: providers on/off, fallback order, per-feature model+params, feature flags, quotas) via createAdminRoute, guarded by AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE (§5.6/FR-5). Validate body against the @repo/schemas ai-settings schema; invalidate config cache on write. Tests: route unit tests asserting update persists, cache invalidates (AC-1 swap path), invalid blob → 422, non-super → 403.

subtasks.title: Schema validation + cache invalidation on write

tasks.title: Create admin AI prompt-version routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api admin routes /api/v1/admin/ai/prompts* (list/create/activate versioned per-feature prompts in ai_prompt_versions) via createAdminRoute, guarded by AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE (§5.6.3/FR-5). Activating a version flips is_active. Engine must still fall back to in-code default on empty/invalid (AC-12, verified in T-034). Tests: route unit tests asserting version create/activate and non-super → 403.

tasks.title: Implement createStreamingRoute() SSE factory
tasks.description: Add createStreamingRoute() to apps/api route factories + a streaming path in ResponseFactory emitting text/event-stream (§5.9/FR-10/AC-10), extending the existing factory pattern. Adapt an AiService.streamText async iterable to SSE token events. Tests: route unit tests asserting Content-Type text/event-stream and incremental token frames (AC-10) using StubProvider.

tasks.title: Add AI entitlement + limit keys in @repo/billing
tasks.description: Per Q2, add to packages/billing/src/types/{entitlement,plan}.types.ts + config/{entitlements,limits}.config.ts (lowercase snake_case): gates ai_text_improve/ai_chat/ai_search/ai_support and limits max_ai_<feature>_per_month. Wire default per-plan values (HOST tiers, tourist free/pro/vip per §5.7 matrix). Tests: unit tests asserting keys exist and default plan→limit mapping resolves.

subtasks.title: Add 4 gate keys + 4 limit keys (snake_case, Q2)

tasks.title: Wire AI quota enforcement into apps/api
tasks.description: Apply login-required + per-feature entitlement/limit enforcement on AI endpoints reusing entitlementMiddleware() + 5-min cache (apps/api/src/middlewares/entitlement.ts, Q2/§5.7). Unauthenticated → 401 (AC-5); over-limit → controlled 403 with upgrade hint (AC-6); meter the attempt regardless. Tests: route integration tests asserting 401 anon, 403 at limit with meter row (AC-5/AC-6).

tasks.title: Apply sliding-window rate-limit to AI endpoints
tasks.description: Reuse createSlidingWindowPerUserRateLimit() (apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts, Q6 — do NOT build a new counter) on AI endpoints with configurable windows, plus per-IP as defense-in-depth (§5.10.1). This is independent of the monthly quota (T-031) and USD ceiling. Tests: route unit tests asserting burst over the window is rejected and the limiter is the reused factory.

tasks.title: Create admin AI usage reporting routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api admin routes /api/v1/admin/ai/usage* exposing per user/feature/month aggregates (T-018) via createAdminRoute guarded by AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE (FR-7). page+pageSize pagination. Tests: route unit tests asserting aggregates returned and non-super → 403.

tasks.title: Wire prompt resolution with in-code default fallback
tasks.description: In the engine, resolve the active prompt per feature from ai_prompt_versions; on empty/invalid/missing admin prompt, fall back to a mandatory in-code default so a feature never bricks (§5.6.3/AC-12). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests asserting active prompt used when valid and in-code default used when admin prompt empty/invalid (AC-12).

tasks.title: Wire Sentry + PostHog observability
tasks.description: Wire Sentry (provider failures, timeouts, fallbacks, ceiling trips) and PostHog (per-feature usage events) as observability sinks (§5.13). All external emits pass through the PII scrubber (T-019/AC-11). RO-RO, JSDoc. Tests: unit tests with Sentry/PostHog mocked asserting an error breadcrumb on fallback and a usage event per feature, both PII-scrubbed.

subtasks.title: Scrub PII before emit + write tests

tasks.title: Write AC-4 no-env/no-vault static guard test
tasks.description: Add a test/lint check (AC-4) asserting @repo/ai-core source contains NO process.env access and NO @repo/db access outside src/storage/, and no vault access. Scan src/** programmatically. Wire into the package test run / CI guard. Tests: the guard itself is the test — must fail if a process.env or out-of-storage db import is introduced.

subtasks.title: Static scan for process.env in src/**
Wire guard into test run / CI

tasks.title: Write vault round-trip + enforcement integration tests
tasks.description: Integration tests against apps/api: (1) admin saves an OpenAI key → DB stores ciphertext, apps/api decrypts + uses it, audit row written (AC-3); (2) anon → 401, tourist-free at limit → 403 + meter (AC-5/AC-6); (3) ceiling breach hard-stop + 100% alert (AC-8). Use StubProvider + throwaway vault key, never real APIs (AC-13). Files under apps/api/test/ai/. Tests: this task IS the integration suite.

tasks.title: Write streaming + provider-swap E2E tests
tasks.description: E2E tests: (1) streaming endpoint returns text/event-stream with incremental tokens (AC-10); (2) admin changes chat primary openai→anthropic → next call uses new provider with no redeploy (AC-1); (3) fallback on simulated 5xx records ai_usage event (AC-2). StubProvider only, no real APIs, assert ≥90% coverage on the package (AC-13). Files under apps/api/test/ai/. Tests: this task IS the E2E suite + coverage gate.

tasks.title: Write @repo/ai-core README + usage guide
tasks.description: Author packages/ai-core/README.md and a usage guide (public API surface, capabilities, provider config, locale param, how apps/api passes credentials by param) per FR-14. JSDoc on exports is done in code tasks; this is the package-level prose. No tests (docs).

tasks.title: Write ADR for AI foundation architecture
tasks.description: Add an ADR under docs/decisions/ capturing the architecture and resolved decisions: provider-agnostic wrap of Vercel AI SDK, tables in @repo/db (non-portable tradeoff), Q1 dedicated audit table, Q2 per-feature snake_case keys in @repo/billing, Q3 schemas in @repo/schemas, Q4 provider-agnostic moderation, Q6 reused rate-limit, Q7 JSONB settings. No tests (docs).

tasks.title: Write packages/ai-core/CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Author packages/ai-core/CLAUDE.md (conventions: package never reads env/secrets, storage/ is the only db-coupled module, RO-RO, named exports, StubProvider for tests, add-a-provider recipe). Mirror the per-package CLAUDE.md style used across the monorepo. No tests (docs).

subtasks.title: Package CLAUDE.md with conventions + add-provider recipe

tasks.title: Final coverage + lint/typecheck verification pass
tasks.description: Run full pnpm typecheck + lint + test across @repo/ai-core, @repo/schemas, @repo/billing, @repo/db, apps/api touched surfaces; confirm ≥90% coverage on the package (AC-13), no .only/.skip, no raw ilike, no any. Remove any temporary workarounds. Tests: this task verifies the full suite is green; no new product code.

subtasks.title: Run typecheck + lint + test across touched packages
